raw_text:
```json
{
  "visual_type": "Reflection visual",
  "design_goal": "To provide a serene, safe visual container for a somatic and spiritual grounding practice, mirroring the 'message of safety' mentioned in the text.",
  "emotional_tone": "Warm intimacy, quiet pacing, and grounded presence.",
  "layout_direction": "Editorial-style layout with text positioned to respect a large area of negative space. High line-height (leading) for the Arabic script to ensure the reading experience feels unhurried and spacious.",
  "text_hierarchy": "Opening hook (Soft Headline), step-by-step somatic guidance (Body), Divine Names (Emphasized/Centered), and a gentle closing invitation (Secondary).",
  "color_direction": "Warm sand, muted linen, and soft charcoal for typography to maintain a premium, grounded feel.",
  "visual_elements": ["Subtle fabric texture", "Soft diffused light shadow", "Massive negative space", "Minimalist composition"],
  "image_prompt": "A high-end minimalist editorial photograph of a soft, textured linen fabric draped gently, captured in the warm, low-angled light of dusk. The composition features massive negative space in the upper two-thirds of the frame to allow for Arabic typography. Muted beige and warm cream tones, soft diffused shadows, deeply calming and tactile atmosphere, premium and still.",
  "avoid": ["Literal illustrations of hands on chest", "Bright or neon colors", "Busy patterns", "Generic spiritual icons like lotuses", "Cramped text boxes", "Default social media templates"],
  "reasoning_summary": "Since the text guides the reader through a somatic practice of self-witnessing and safety, the visual uses tactile textures (linen) and soft evening light to physically represent the 'message of safety' and the 'before sleep' context provided in the caption."
}
```
